title: Burning Bridges
content:
{{Top|leg}}
"'''Burning Bridges'''" was a [[Music/Legends|song]] by [[Annadale Fayde]], released on the album ''[[Emotional Hostages]]''. It was given a Scarlet rating by the [[Imperial Board of Culture]].

==Sources==
*<!-- 1993-05-XX -->''[[Galaxy Guide 9: Fragments from the Rim]]''
